concerns.text: FR-003 mandates Yeo 7-network atlas for DMN ROI extraction, but Constitution Principle VI requires AAL atlas. Task T021 implements Yeo per spec, creating a constitutional violation that blocks implementation. Spec must be amended to align with Constitution VI.

FR-010 requires post-hoc power analysis, but plan.md specifies a priori power analysis. Task T019 implements post-hoc per spec, leaving plan-spec misalignment unresolved. T059 acknowledges this but does not fix it. Plan must be amended to match spec.

T018 description references 'per FR-008' but FR-008 is about dataset-variable fit verification, not power analysis. T019 handles power analysis (FR-010). This is a minor description inconsistency that could confuse traceability.
